nasb.text: Just as a gazelle or a deer is eaten, so you will eat it; the unclean and the clean alike may eat of it.

esv.text: Just as the gazelle or the deer is eaten, so you may eat of it. The unclean and the clean alike may eat of it.

cnv.text: 你吃那肉，好像人吃羚羊和鹿的肉一樣；不潔淨的人和潔淨的人都可以一起吃。

ccb.text: 就像你们吃羚羊和鹿一样。洁净的人和不洁净的人都可以吃。
